Chen Yan йҷіе»¶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Yan (йҷіе»¶)was born in Shangdang. Attacked by Zhang Yang in 191, he withstood a two month siege thanks to neighbours. Chen Yan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
